-- 1. check output file sizes against input files
select count(*) from customer.ext_inc_claims_1000006_20240229_20240701_ELS_Cohort_Geo1_t;
--34,433,716
--28,858,039


-- Mortality part --
select count(*) as cnt, sum(case when deceased_match_indicator = 'N' then 1 else 0 end) as cnt_no_match from customer.ext_inc_mortality_LNR101_1000006_LNR101_3622901_ELS_All_2_appended_t;
--374297   317316

select month_of_death, count(*)
from appl.elsevier_deid_mortality_t
group by month_of_death
order by 1;
-- null 2172275
